_comment: Example MCP config. Copy to your MCP host (e.g. Cline settings or .mcp.json) and ADJUST PATHS. Filesystem is restricted to the project root only.

filesystem._note: Restricted to project root. DO NOT add $HOME or '/' here.

git._note: Local repo only. Destructive commands (reset, force push) should be reviewed.

_disabled_docker._warning: OPTIONAL. Enable only if you need MCP to drive Docker. Can interact with any container.

_disabled_github._warning: NETWORK REQUIRED. Sends repo data to api.github.com. Disabled by default.

_disabled_web_browser._warning: NETWORK REQUIRED. Browses external URLs. Disabled by default.
